title: Claude can now 'dream' as Anthropic races to build ‘self improving’ AI agents
snippet: Anthropic has launched a new Dreams feature that enables the AI chatbot to review past interactions and refine its memory for better insights.&nbsp;

title: Google Chrome secretly installed a 4GB Gemini AI model on your computer: here's what we know
snippet: Google Chrome may be consuming more space than expected due to an automatic download of a 4GB AI model called Gemini Nano. Users can disable the model through Chrome settings, but it reinstalls if certain AI features are enabled.

snippet: Study says AI has yet to transform cybercrime

title: Vivo X300 FE with Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 processor, 6,500mAh battery launched in India: Price, specs and features
snippet: Vivo has unveiled the X300 Fan Edition featuring ZEISS optics, Snapdragon 8 Gen 5, and a 6.31-inch AMOLED display. It offers a 6,500mAh battery, advanced camera capabilities, and runs on OriginOS 6.&nbsp;

title: Vivo X300 Ultra launched in India with dual 200MP ZEISS cameras, 6,600mAh battery: Price, specs and features
snippet: Vivo has launched the X300 Ultra in India, featuring a dual 200MP camera, Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 processor, and a 6,600mAh battery.

title: Apple agrees to pay $250 million to iPhone 15 and 16 users to settle lawsuit over missing Siri AI features
snippet: Apple has settled a lawsuit over misleading users regarding its Apple Intelligence features, agreeing to pay $250 million. The settlement, pending approval, will compensate iPhone 15 and 16 buyers. The company faces criticism for delays in its promised Siri update and AI capabilities.

title: Pixxel, Sarvam to build India’s first orbital data centre satellite amid space computing push
snippet: India is taking early steps toward space-based computing as Pixxel and Sarvam partner to build an orbital data centre satellite. The move comes amid rising global interest and energy constraints, though experts caution that high launch costs and technical challenges may limit near term viability

title: Samsung Galaxy smartwatches bring premium features at better prices now
snippet: Samsung Galaxy smartwatches are now available at attractive prices, making it easier to upgrade to premium features like health tracking, AMOLED displays, and long battery life without stretching your budget.

title: OpenAI quietly gave US government early access to its powerful GPT-5.5 model for ‘national security testing’
snippet: OpenAI provided early access to its GPT-5.5 AI model for national security testing to the US government. The company is also collaborating with the Center for AI Standards and Innovation for testing future models&nbsp;

title: Tech is betting on a former executive in the race for California governor
snippet: Tech investor favorite Matt Mahan, a moderate Democrat and former tech executive, is running for California governor. He's gained significant funding from the tech industry, contrasting himself with career politicians and focusing on pragmatic solutions for homelessness and crime.

title: Snap flags ad revenue hit from Middle East conflict, slower North America growth
snippet: Snap experienced a decline in advertising revenues during the first quarter, largely impacted by ongoing tensions in the Middle East and a slowdown in growth within North America. title: Corning partners with Nvidia to expand US fiber optic output for AI growth
snippet: Corning and Nvidia are partnering to significantly boost U.S. production of optical connectivity products for AI data centers. This collaboration will tenfold Corning's optical connectivity manufacturing capacity and expand domestic fiber production by over 50%, creating thousands of jobs.

title: KPIT Technologies’ Q4 net profit slips to Rs 163 crore
snippet: KPIT Technologies reported a 33.4% year-on-year drop in Q4 FY26 net profit to Rs. 162.9 crore, impacted by geopolitical uncertainties, despite an 11.9% revenue increase.
